query:
SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.convenioId, c.nome as convenioNome, a.direcao, a.estabelecimentoId, e.nome as estabelecimentoNome
FROM arquivos a 
LEFT JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id
LEFT JOIN estabelecimentos e ON a.estabelecimentoId = e.id
WHERE e.nome LIKE '%Ox%' OR e.nome LIKE '%UTI%'
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.convenioId, c.nome as convenioNome, a.direcao, a.estabelecimentoId, e.nome as estabelecimentoNome
FROM arquivos a 
LEFT JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id
LEFT JOIN estabelecimentos e ON a.estabelecimentoId = e.id
WHERE e.nome LIKE '%Ox%' OR e.nome LIKE '%UTI%'
LIMIT 20;
